description: Benchmark on 86 real de-identified TCGA patient mutation cases (open-access data, cBioPortal)
pipeline: 4-layer: Tier 1 on-label FDA → Tier 2 off-label FDA → Tier 3 ClinicalTrials.gov matching → Tier 4 custom drug (manual trigger only)

tier_definitions.DIRECT_FDA: Exact or evidence-matched FDA-approved therapy for the variant/context.
tier_definitions.FDA_REPURPOSING: Off-label FDA-approved option for same mutation in a different tumour context.
tier_definitions.INVESTIGATIONAL_REPURPOSING: Live ClinicalTrials.gov trial matching, including basket/agnostic opportunities.
tier_definitions.CUSTOM_DESIGN: Custom drug workflow is never auto-generated; it requires explicit manual user action.
